ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the property */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, rented) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the property in square meters */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "next_inspection_due" TEXT /* Date when the next property inspection is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property occupied by the tenant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the tenant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the tenant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the tenant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the tenant */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the tenant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "occupancy_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the tenant moved in */,
  "occupancy_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the tenant is expected to move out */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or recommendation for the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenants_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "town" TEXT /* Town where the property is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the property */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the property */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "property_tax_id" TEXT /* Property tax ID for tax-related purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease agreement */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tenant's ID */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property's ID */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease agreement */,
  "monthly_rent" REAL /* Monthly rent amount */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease can be renewed */,
  "renewal_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions for lease renewal */,
  "security_deposit" REAL /* Amount of the security deposit */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee amount for late rent payments */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of rent payments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tenant making the request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property for which maintenance is requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance request was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance request */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name or ID of the maintenance staff assigned to the request */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance request was completed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance work */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment made */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tenant making the payment */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lease associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the external payment processing system */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the payment has been successfully processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tenant receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the tenant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification */,
  "action_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification requires action from the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)
